'''âf-m-b''' ('''kafamab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaguebook|vaguebook]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaguebook|vaguebook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-m-b
|-
! Lemma
| kafamab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifamab|thifamab]] || [[word:jifamab|jifamab]] || [[word:shifamab|shifamab]] || [[word:kifamab|kifamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufamab|thuthufamab]] || [[word:jujufamab|jujufamab]] || [[word:shushufamab|shushufamab]] || [[word:kukufamab|kukufamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufamab|thufamab]] || [[word:jufamab|jufamab]] || [[word:shufamab|shufamab]] || [[word:kufamab|kufamab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufamab|thufamab]] || [[word:jufamab|jufamab]] || [[word:shufamab|shufamab]] || [[word:kufamab|kufamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefamab|thefamab]] || [[word:jefamab|jefamab]] || [[word:shefamab|shefamab]] || [[word:kefamab|kefamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofamab|thothofamab]] || [[word:jojofamab|jojofamab]] || [[word:shoshofamab|shoshofamab]] || [[word:kokofamab|kokofamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofamab|thofamab]] || [[word:jofamab|jofamab]] || [[word:shofamab|shofamab]] || [[word:kofamab|kofamab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofamab|thofamab]] || [[word:jofamab|jofamab]] || [[word:shofamab|shofamab]] || [[word:kofamab|kofamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfamab|thĂŠfamab]] || [[word:jĂŠfamab|jĂŠfamab]] || [[word:shĂŠfamab|shĂŠfamab]] || [[word:kĂŠfamab|kĂŠfamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafamab|thathafamab]] || [[word:jajafamab|jajafamab]] || [[word:shashafamab|shashafamab]] || [[word:kakafamab|kakafamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafamab|thafamab]] || [[word:jafamab|jafamab]] || [[word:shafamab|shafamab]] || [[word:kafamab|kafamab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafamab|thafamab]] || [[word:jafamab|jafamab]] || [[word:shafamab|shafamab]] || [[word:kafamab|kafamab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafamab|shafamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafamab|goshafamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafamab|gokishafamab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafamabnĂŒ|shafamabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafamabnknĂŒ|goshafamabnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamabnĂŒ|gokishafamabnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafamabshĂ«|shafamabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafamabnkshĂ«|goshafamabnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafamabshĂ«|gokishafamabshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamabro|shafamabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamabnkro|goshafamabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamabro|gokishafamabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamabmu|shafamabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamabnkmu|goshafamabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamabmu|gokishafamabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafamabsher|shafamabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafamabnksher|goshafamabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafamabsher|gokishafamabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafamabng|shafamabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafamabnkng|goshafamabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafamabng|gokishafamabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafamabya|shafamabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafamabnkya|goshafamabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafamabya|gokishafamabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafamabyam|shafamabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafamabnkyam|goshafamabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafamabyam|gokishafamabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamabnĂŒshĂ«|shafamabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamabnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafamabnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamabnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafamabnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamabnĂŒro|shafamabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamabnknĂŒro|goshafamabnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamabnĂŒro|gokishafamabnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamabnĂŒmu|shafamabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamabnknĂŒmu|goshafamabnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamabnĂŒmu|gokishafamabnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamabshĂ«nĂŒ|shafamabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamabnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafamabnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamabshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafamabshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamabshĂ«ro|shafamabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamabnkshĂ«ro|goshafamabnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamabshĂ«ro|gokishafamabshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamabshĂ«mu|shafamabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamabnkshĂ«mu|goshafamabnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamabshĂ«mu|gokishafamabshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamabronĂŒ|shafamabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamabnkronĂŒ|goshafamabnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamabronĂŒ|gokishafamabronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamabroshĂ«|shafamabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamabnkroshĂ«|goshafamabnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamabroshĂ«|gokishafamabroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafamabromu|shafamabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafamabnkromu|goshafamabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafamabromu|gokishafamabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafamabmunĂŒ|shafamabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafamabnkmunĂŒ|goshafamabnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafamabmunĂŒ|gokishafamabmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafamabmushĂ«|shafamabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafamabnkmushĂ«|goshafamabnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafamabmushĂ«|gokishafamabmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafamabmuro|shafamabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafamabnkmuro|goshafamabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafamabmuro|gokishafamabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
